zh.lifeSummary: Belanne de Keddington於大約1044年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利利蒙特。她於1061年與Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世於1070年在英國維爾爾享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Belanne de Keddington于大约1044年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利利蒙特。她于1061年与Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。她去世于1070年在英国維爾爾享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Keddington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from Rettendon (Essex), from an uncertain first element + Old English dūn ‘hill’.
Irish (Mayo): from an Anglicized form of Ó Roideacháin or Ó Rodacháin; see Roddy 2.

variants.name: Mulderig
meanings: Irish: variant of Mulderrig, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoildeirg, ‘descendant of Maoilderg’, a personal name meaning ‘red youth’. For this reason Reddington , Reid , and Rutledge were sometimes adopted as Anglicized forms. However it appears that Mulderrig began as a re-interpreted variant of Ó Maoilgheiric, ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Cyriacus’, a Donegal surname. Saint Cyriacus was the finder of Christ's cross, according to the Martyrology of Oengus (May 12). This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland, and is now found chiefly in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Roddy
meanings: of Galway origin, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Rodaigh ‘descendant of Rodach’, a personal name based on rod ‘spirited, lively, strong’. Forms with vowel e derive from a variant, Ó Roidigh. Compare Redding .

shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Rodacháin ‘descendant of Rodachán’, a personal name which is a diminutive of rodach. This was an ecclesiastical family in Leitrim. A variant Ó Roideacháin gives Redican , for which Reddington was sometimes adopted as an Anglicized equivalent.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: Belanne de Keddington was born about 1044, in Richemont, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France. She married Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes in 1061, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died in 1070, in Wiltshire, England, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Belanne de Keddington est née environ 1044, à Richemont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France. Elle a épousé Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes en 1061, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée en 1070, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Belanne de Keddington wurde um 1044 in Richemont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat 1061 in Normandie, Frankreich Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Sie starb 1070 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Belanne de Keddington è nata il circa 1044 nel Richemont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Lei sposato Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes nel 1061, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì nel 1070, nel Wiltshire, England, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Belanne de Keddingtonは約1044年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメリケモントで生まれた。1061年にフランスノーマンディでRoaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼女は1070年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Belanne de Keddington(은)는 대략 1044년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 리체몽에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1061년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1070년 영국 윌츠히르에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Tideswell, Derbyshire, England: Tideswell, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Belanne de Keddington nasceu aproximadamente 1044, em Richemont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França. Ela casou-se com Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes em 1061, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1070, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Belanne de Keddington родилась около 1044 г. в местности ричемонт, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes в 1061 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла в 1070 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Belanne de Keddington nació aproximadamente 1044, en Richemont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Se casó con Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes en 1061, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió en 1070, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 27 años.
